name: Rio Grande Kidney Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Kidney beans, canned with liquid
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry bacon over medium heat in a heavy frying pan. Crumble the bacon and set aside.
2. Reheat the bacon drippings over medium heat. Sauté garlic and onion until tender, stirring occasionally.
3. Puree the beans in a blender or food processor fitted with a steel blade. Stir the pureed beans into the onion mixture.
4. Blend in the crumbled bacon and remaining ingredients, stirring occasionally until the soup is hot.
5. Remove and discard the bay leaves. The soup will thicken as it stands and can be thinned with water or additional beef broth.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE CHO: 19g; PRO: 8g; FAT: 3g; CAL: 136
Low-sodium diets: This recipe is not suitable.
Source: The Art of Cooking for the Diabetic by Mary Abbott Hess, R.D., M.S. and Katharine Middleton
